name: Walnut Golf Club - Riverwoods
address: 4801 N University Ave Suite 160, Provo, UT 84604
about: Walnut Golf Club is an indoor golf venue in Provo, Utah, established in 2021 and now under new ownership. The facility offers a premium golfing experience year-round, featuring top-of-the-line golf simulators, private bays, and exclusive access to a PuttView putting simulator. Memberships provide unlimited access to multiple Utah County locations and the ability to play prestigious golf courses worldwide. The venue focuses on perfecting the game through advanced technology, offering features like TrackMan launch monitors and an intuitive putting system. With a limited membership model, Walnut Golf Club aims to provide a premium and accessible indoor golf environment for players of all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to TrackMan launch monitors for accurate shot analysis and swing improvement
Exclusive PuttView putting system, the only one open to the public in Utah
Unlimited access to multiple prestigious golf courses worldwide from a private bay
24/7 availability allows for convenient and flexible practice times
Private bays provide a focused environment for mastering the sport

food_and_drink.notes: No information on food service available
No information on alcohol service available

simulator_hardware.notes: Top-of-the-line golf simulator with launch monitor technology
Augmented Reality putting simulator that overlays information onto the green

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue provides all necessary equipment for use in the simulator bays, but players are welcome to bring their own clubs if they prefer.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No specific policy on outside food or drink is mentioned on the website.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing time varies depending on pace and group size, but typically takes 1-2 hours per round in a simulator environment.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No specific information about child-friendly features or policies is mentioned on the website.
